CAUSE CALLED, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOGES, DAVID AKA FEKADE D. MOGES IND/DBA LOVELL ROAD B.P. POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: 1 TRITON 9600 ATM MACHINE, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $5,483.63 DAMAGES, $875.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $214.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,572.63, INTEREST $ 46.40 TOTAL $ 6,619.03 SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
STATUS CONFERENCE OF MAY-31-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
